patches.summary: Add anti-pattern for merge queue race condition
patches.pattern: Workers calling complete-task before verifying PR is merged causes merge queue loops
patches.suggestion: Before calling complete-task, verify the PR status is 'merged' not just 'ready'
patches.rationale: Prevents the infinite merge loop pitfall observed multiple times

observations.text: T-11 2026-03-16: worker completed task before PR was actually merged, triggering re-queue loop

patches.summary: Require observation count check before staging instruction patches
patches.pattern: Role doc patches staged without evidence backing can cause instruction drift
patches.suggestion: Always check observation count meets threshold before calling approve-patch on role doc patches

observations.text: 2026-03-16: patch was staged with only 1 observation, leading to premature role doc change

patches.pattern: Workers calling complete-task before PR merged
